name: sysinfo
description: 本机硬件/OS 概览（CPU / 内存 / OS / 机器名）
command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem | Select-Object Manufacturer,Model,TotalPhysicalMemory | Format-List | Out-String; Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem | Select-Object Caption,Version,OSArchitecture,BuildNumber | Format-List | Out-String; (Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor).Name"
